name: Atlassian Corporation plc
lede: Atlassian runs two capability centers in Bengaluru. Bengaluru, covering R&D, built over eight years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Atlassian office in India. We map two, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Atlassian GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Atlassian runs 2 verified GCC centers in Bengaluru, covering R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Atlassian's India footprint covers Bengaluru, spanning R&D. The centers deliver IT, HR, Procurement and Customer Support for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Collaborative Software, Communication and Collaboration Software

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 43 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Atlassian operate in India?
faq.a: Atlassian operates 2 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Atlassian have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Atlassian's India GCC presence is in Bengaluru.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Atlassian run in India?
faq.a: Atlassian runs R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Atlassian's India GCCs?
faq.a: Atlassian's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Atlassian's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 43 leaders at Atlassian's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
